testcase.name: test_create_payouts_idempotent
testcase.failure: tests/test_stripe_connect_payouts_e2e.py:126: in test_create_payouts_idempotent first, second = loop.run_until_complete(_twice()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_stripe_connect_payouts_e2e.py:117: in _twice await create_payouts_for_order(order_id) services/payouts.py:41: in create_payouts_for_order existing = await db.payouts.find_one({"order_id": order_id}, {"_id": 0}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/metaprogramming.py:74: in method return framework.run_on_executor( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/motor/frameworks/asyncio/__init__.py:85: in run_on_executor return loop.run_in_executor(_EXECUTOR, functools.partial(fn, *args, **kwargs)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:817: in run_in_executor self._check_closed() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:520: in _check_closed raise RuntimeError('Event loop is closed') E RuntimeError: Event loop is closed
